_provenance: Digitized 2026-06-12 from OSM stage footprint (way 623261253) + Esri World Imagery + USGS 1m DEM diagnostics. All anchor values INFERRED (imagery/OSM-derived), not surveyed.
stage_rect_note: OSM stage HOUSE footprint incl. backstage; performance deck is smaller — cross-checked vs 2002 rebuild total of 10,000 sq ft stage+backstage
arc_center_note: stage-front center = stage centroid moved 12.0 m along az 275.8 (half of OSM short dim)

breaks_ft._basis: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure + hillshade ring reads; row1 = first riser, seating_top = upper concourse bench at ~248 ft elev

fan_deg._basis: inferred from DEM hillshade terrace extent (spoke overlay); +/-10 deg

stage_frontage_ft._basis: inferred: deck west-edge span read from hillshade/imagery; OSM house long dim 125 ft is the upper bound incl. wings

stage_depth_ft._basis: inferred: performance deck depth unknown; OSM house short dim 79 ft includes backstage; 2002 rebuild total 10,000 sqft stage+backstage bounds it

row_count_note: estimated from DEM riser detection below

row_count_inferred.value: 40 lettered terrace rows in 4 banks + 14 floor rows (T/U/V)
row_count_inferred._basis: published 2007 venue seating chart (archived PDF); supersedes earlier ~30-40 imagery estimate

ada_circulation_note: main cross-aisle visible ~ring 30 m + concourse at top of bowl; ADA platform added 2003 (published); switchback access roads N and S of bowl
backdrop_note: audience faces ~E into canyon hillside (oak woodland) behind stage house; enclosed canyon venue with tall stage house + roof
capacity_basis: published ticketing capacity, configuration-dependent: 4,562 standard reserved (Wikipedia infobox); venue seating page lists 4,500 reserved-floor / 5,000 GA-floor totals

row_structure_published.source: official 2007 reserved-seating chart PDF (sbbowl.com via Wayback 2014 capture)
row_structure_published.extras: P/S handicapped sections + R Founders Row at one level between floor and J-O bank; mixer mid-bowl in L

dem_verification.terrace_preservation: VERIFIED — hillshade resolves concentric terrace banding matching aerial imagery (diagnostic_dem.png vs diagnostic_imagery.png); graded bench terraces survive bare-earth filtering as ground
dem_verification.known_voids: stage house filtered to ground beneath deck; individual ~1 ft risers below 1 m resolution

route_concept.value: vehicular/walk approach to a single accessible level immediately behind the floor; designated HANDICAPPED sections P (house L) and S (house R) flanking Founders Row

vertical_drop_ft.value: bowl rises 68.8 ft floor->top; accessible seating avoids it by staying at the near-floor level

dispersion.value: single elevation, two lateral positions (P+S); no upper-bowl accessible seating evident

redundancy.value: two flank approaches (N and S service paths) to the accessible level

sightline_preservation.value: front-of-bank positions look over the floor sections; plausibly preserved but UNVERIFIED (no C-value data)
